=== Build Ready Plugin ===
Contributors: openai
Tags: blocks, build
Requires at least: 6.4
Tested up to: 6.9
Requires PHP: 8.1
Stable tag: 1.4.0
License: GPL-2.0-or-later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html

Demonstrates a plugin layout that is compatible with @wordpress/build packaging conventions.

== Description ==

Build Ready Plugin includes generated build artifacts in the package while excluding source-only workspaces.

== Changelog ==

= 1.4.0 =
* Update - Initial release.
